Tests that `Math.ceil` returns `NaN` when the input is `NaN`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function when it receives `NaN` (Not-a-Number) as an input. The script uses the `assert` function to check that the result of `Math.ceil(NaN)` is `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to the ECMAScript specification. This test ensures that the `Math.ceil` function correctly handles non-numeric input by returning `NaN`. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific aspect of the `Math.ceil` function.
